description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses alpine:latest as the default image and defines MySQL variables (MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_PASSWORD, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, MYSQL_USER). Add a single stage called test and a phpunit job in that stage that runs on the php:7.2-alpine image with a mysql:5.5 service, caches the vendor directory, and executes a before_script `ash ci/before_phpunit.sh > /dev/null`. The job then runs the commands `php composer.phar global require hirak/prestissimo`, `php composer.phar install --dev`, `cp -p config/app.ci.php config/app.php`, and `vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-html coverage/`. Publish the `coverage/` directory as an artifact that expires after one week, and configure the job to be excluded on branches matching the regex `/^.*-no-test$/` and on the master branch, using runners tagged `test`.
